query: INSERT INTO auth.users (id, instance_id, aud, role, email, encrypted_password, email_confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at, confirmation_token, raw_app_meta_data, raw_user_meta_data, is_super_admin) VALUES ('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000', 'authenticated', 'authenticated', 'admin@certdesk.test', crypt('testpass123', gen_salt('bf')), NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), '', '{"provider":"email","providers":["email"]}', '{"nome":"Admin","cognome":"Test"}', false) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING; INSERT INTO user_profiles (id, nome, cognome, ruolo, attivo) VALUES ('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'Admin', 'Test', 'admin', true) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING; INSERT INTO clienti (id, nome, ragione_sociale, piva, attivo, created_by) VALUES ('a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'Cliente Test F14', 'Cliente Test Srl', '12345678901', true, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING; SELECT 'SETUP OK' as result;
